data.title: HelloNation and U.S. First Responders Association Announce New Partnership to Spotlight First Responder Service and Community Impact
data.description: In Panama City, Florida on March 12, 2026, a partnership was announced to highlight the efforts of first responders nationwide. HelloNation, a media outlet specializing in community stories and expert-led content, will be collaborating to share impactful narratives and community-focused material. This initiative aims to honor the work of first responders and shed light on their valuable contributions.

data.title: Consumer Watchdog: 5 Ways To Lower California Gasoline Prices, Which Are $2 More Than US Prices In Bay Area
data.description: In Los Angeles on March 12, 2026, Jamie Court, President of Consumer Watchdog, addressed the surge in California gasoline prices. Court attributed the spike to the conflict in Iran, which has caused a hike in crude oil prices. However, Court indicated that this is just one factor contributing to the state's average price of $5 per gallon.

data.title: In HelloNation, Home Improvement Expert Logan MacMillen Explains How Visual & Functional Upgrades Refresh a Home
data.description: In Traverse City, Michigan on March 12, 2026, homeowners are seeking ways to refresh their living spaces without undertaking a complete remodel. Home Improvement Expert Logan MacMillen from All Weather Seal suggests in an article by HelloNation that making small enhancements to windows and bathrooms can help achieve this goal.

data.title: In HelloNation, Brake Repair Expert Jason Stem Encourages Drivers to Ask Questions
data.description: In Easton, Pennsylvania, on March 12, 2026, Brake Repair Expert Jason Stem from The Brake Shop & Auto Repair advises drivers on how to handle unfamiliar terms or recommendations during vehicle repairs. Stem highlights the importance of asking questions in such situations. It is crucial for drivers to seek clarification to ensure they understand the repair process effectively and make informed decisions. Stem emphasizes the significance of clear communication between drivers and mechanics to promote trust and efficiency in resolving vehicle issues.

data.title: Greenberg Traurig Continues Strategic Growth of Private Wealth Services Practice with Shareholder Julie Sirlin Pleshivoy in Chicago
data.description: In Chicago on March 12, 2026, Greenberg Traurig, LLP, a global law firm, strengthened its Private Wealth Services Practice by welcoming Shareholder Julie Sirlin Pleshivoy. data.title: PitchBook Announces New Essential MCP Integration with Perplexity, Expanding Access to AI-Powered, Verifiable Market Intelligence
data.description: A recent partnership has been revealed between PitchBook and Perplexity, wherein users can now access PitchBook's firmographic intelligence through Perplexity's conversational interface. This partnership introduces the PitchBook Essential MCP server, offering users convenient access to trusted data within Perplexity's AI-answer engine. This collaboration showcases the accelerating trend of AI adoption in financial services, highlighting the importance of receiving accurate information swiftly.

data.title: Rakovina Therapeutics Announces Extension of Non-Brokered Private Placement
data.description: In Vancouver, BC on March 12, 2026, Rakovina Therapeutics Inc. (TSX-V: RKV; FSE: 7JO0), a biopharmaceutical company utilizing AI for cancer drug development, has been granted a 30-day extension by the TSXV for its non-brokered private placement financing. Initially announced on January 27, 2026, and February 20, 2026, the Offering is now slated to close by April 9, 2026, or on another date agreed upon by Rakovina and the TSXV.

data.title: Report of transactions of shares and related securities of Bavarian Nordic by persons holding managerial responsibilities and/or persons/companies closely associated with such
data.description: Today, on March 12, 2026, Bavarian Nordic A/S (OMX: BAVA) announced that individuals with managerial responsibilities and/or closely associated persons/companies have conducted transactions involving the Company’s shares/related securities. This information is disclosed in compliance with Article 19 of Regulation No. 596/2014 on Market Abuse and Implementing Regulation 2016/523.

data.title: /U P D A T E -- PCA SKIN/
data.description: PCA SKIN® is commemorating National Peel Day by recognizing the "Esthetician of the Year" recipients. The news was released on 10-Mar-2026 through PR Newswire. The company has included an image along with the announcement. Celebrating this day, PCA SKIN® aims to highlight the achievements of top estheticians in the industry.
